name: un-punt
description: un-punt — capture deferrals during agent work, finish them on a verified cleanup pass at natural stopping points.

plugins.name: un-punt
plugins.description: Captures deferrals (TODOs, `as any`, skipped tests, swallowed exceptions, chat-form 'I'll handle this later') into `.un-punt/items/*.md` as you work, then proposes verified cleanup passes at natural stopping points under a Refuse > Flag > Fix trust contract.
